'''Spearhead droids''' were a form of kamikaze [[Droid/Legends|droid]] fighter that were employed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the height of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] conflict. As part of their programming, these droids would often dive into enemy planets and, upon passing through the defenses, they would begin ramming strategic locations to cripple the enemy. While a costly tactic, it proved to be remarkably successful and was actually used during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}}
